scripts.dev: npm run build --workspace @auto8/shared && concurrently "npm run dev --workspace @auto8/api" "npm run dev --workspace @auto8/web"
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @auto8/shared && npm run build --workspace @auto8/api && npm run build --workspace @auto8/web
scripts.test: npm run build --workspace @auto8/shared && npm run test --workspace @auto8/api
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --workspace @auto8/shared && npm run typecheck --workspace @auto8/api && npm run typecheck --workspace @auto8/web
